{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410321982FFEAB5BBA54812A04F"}"},"total":1612},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7251123987500286720","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"十多年老书虫了，番茄里很多9.5以上的书我都看不下去，一般在看到七八万字就开始跳着看或者直接翻结局了。这篇分虽低，但是我一章没跳，每个字句都看得很认真。
太太这篇文写得相当走心，女主很可爱男主很隐忍，他们之间没有什么大的波澜，但是随着太太将他们的故事娓娓道来，我似乎也平静下来。这篇文看得人心情非常舒畅，太适合我这种受不了太甜腻也看不了一点虐的老阿姨了[哭]太太多写点！
唯一一点不满是给沈河的[重拳出击]我的车呢？！把车还给我！！！！","text_exts":[{"e":151,"s":149,"text":"舒畅","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%88%92%E7%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743195394812A04F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227251123987500286720%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234133008750480418%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%88%92%E7%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688283932,"group_id":"7234133008750480418","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"安灼拉我的阿波罗他在哪儿？他在街垒，倒挂在鲜红的旗帜上…😭","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N47S+p37foZ44gcGN6J23Hs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a231c6a27800421c98892f42d3aed6fa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875735&x-signature=k72WOy93YzODkP0FYEz1GPTkdFs%3D","user_id":"374290511570451","user_name":"秃头老鸯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"374290511570451","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1695528766,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7234133008750480418","book_info":{"abstract":"楼晓辛辛苦苦考上大学，还没来得及享受一下大学生活，一次车祸直接把她送到了一本《我的男友要黑化》的小说里。
她的身份是一个欺负男主最后惨死的恶毒女配。
现在只有五岁的楼晓：“......”
应该还来得及......吧？

没有金手指的楼晓只能无脑抱男主大腿，希望男主成长以后能放自己一条生路。
但是这个剧情好像有点不对......
原文女主跟别人跑了是怎么一回事？！
男主跟她表白了又是怎么一回事？！

楼晓一脸愁云惨淡，明明她是在科学喂养男主，男主怎么还是病娇黑化了。
甜宠日常，双箭头，女主比较迟钝。
【高亮，所有重要配角对女主都没有爱情，无暧昧，因为涉及剧透其他不多说，请放心阅读！】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b9d4d5ca3108560666465a228eb91a8","author":"子柒夜","author_id":"","book_id":"7234133008750480418","book_name":"原著男主他是恋爱脑","book_short_name":"病娇饲养法","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7234133412976689704","read_count":"18366","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"249394"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"76","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,甜宠,病娇,穿书,黑化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e6573a661df5ccaa207b9539b8f05f52~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503539&x-signature=41lqx5hiupY9a384osbY3OztUgM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"51478851089","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5363336e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410321982FFEAB5BBA54812A04F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":93,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15363,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":44994},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7287961519457944372","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说女主白眼狼的，有认真看吗？这个妈妈连自家女儿一直饭量异常也没有过问，证明平常根本就不上心，除了给钱，没有太多的爱，而且女主才那么大，她知道妈妈要对男主动手，问题是她能做什么？提醒男主小心？让妈妈住手？那他们不会把她当怪物？而且女主也想让男主放过妈妈，男主猜到了，也放过了，妈妈的结局已经很好了。

再者，这个妈妈出国之后，再也没有联系过女主，她难道不怕男主因为她自己报复女主吗？

而且一个母亲，怎么会不顾小孩的感情，说出你爸知道你不是亲生的还会对你好吗这种话来？意思是只有她是真的对女主好？这不是PUA吗？

最后还有一点，妈妈从女主小时候就不关心女主，一直在和楼父斗争，女主从小和男主相依为命，感情难道不比和这个塑料妈妈亲？恐怕女主和家里阿姨的感情都比和这个妈妈要好，看书的时候麻烦走点心吧，别动不动就骂"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696861490,"group_id":"7234133008750480418","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"453415131429580"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7234133008750480418","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.389357e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13893,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":49},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7287955235317580584","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对比故事内容，作者大大的笔力确实有点不太够，但是胜在故事结构饱满，描写人物真情实感

平淡的相伴，水到渠成的感情，有一点刺激的背德感，这些都让我很喜欢

没有多刻骨铭心的东西，但细水长流的感情更叫人感动，就像浸润在一汪温润的泉水中，让人觉得美好又绵长

总会有人记得你的伤痛，也总会有人让你觉得人间值得，这是整篇小说的基调，很让人舒服的阅读感受","text_exts":[{"e":151,"s":147,"text":"人间值得","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E5%80%BC%E5%BE%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743195394812A04F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227287955235317580584%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234133008750480418%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E5%80%BC%E5%BE%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696860420,"group_id":"7234133008750480418","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8JAHJQgQavFWpkE70HOafU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/295344ad3d5144ea84fa62dc5e764b27~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882543&x-signature=Ql82HcVJCQAzGeLIamFuRuxG6II%3D","user_id":"453415131429580","user_name":"纯爱战士冲冲冲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"453415131429580","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7234133008750480418","book_info":{"abstract":"楼晓辛辛苦苦考上大学，还没来得及享受一下大学生活，一次车祸直接把她送到了一本《我的男友要黑化》的小说里。
